commit_message:
Add FailableConsumer.accept(FailableConsumer<T, E>, T) (#1641)

Add missing test class
javadoc_before:
/** * A functional interface like {@link Consumer} that declares a {@link Throwable}. * *

* This is a functional interface whose functional method is {@link #accept(Object)}. *

* * @param the type of the input to the operation * @param Thrown exception type. * @since 3.11 */
javadoc_after:
/** * A functional interface like {@link Consumer} that declares a {@link Throwable}. * *

* This is a functional interface whose functional method is {@link #accept(Object)}. *

* * @param the type of the argument the consumer accepts. * @param The thrown exception type. * @since 3.11 */
entity_signature: @FunctionalInterface public interface FailableConsumer<T, E extends Throwable>
